title: General Release and Liability Waiver
description: A settlement and release form where one party agrees to waive liability and release all legal claims against another party in exchange for compensation.
whatsCovered: Definition of releasor and releasee parties
Release and discharge of all past, present, and future claims
Governing law and court dispute settings
whenToUse: Use this form to settle disputes, waive liability after an accident, or release claims between parties during a commercial exit or legal compromise.

fields.label: Description of Incident / Claim
fields.placeholder: e.g. the bicycling accident occurring on May 1st, 2026, on the park trail...

clauses.heading: GENERAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS
clauses.body: This General Release of Claims (the "Release") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by {releasor_name}, located at {releasor_address} ("Releasor"), in favor of {releasee_name}, located at {releasee_address} ("Releasee").

clauses.heading: 1. Release and Discharge
clauses.body: Releasor hereby releases, acquits, and forever discharges Releasee, including their officers, directors, and employees, from any and all claims, demands, liabilities, and causes of action arising directly or indirectly from the following incident: {dispute_desc}.

clauses.heading: 2. Consideration
clauses.body: In exchange for this waiver and release, Releasee shall pay Releasor a settlement sum of {settlement_amount}, payable within 10 business days following the execution of this Agreement.

clauses.heading: 3. Non-Admission of Liability
clauses.body: This Release represents a compromise settlement of disputed claims. It is explicitly agreed that the payments made under this Release do not constitute, and shall not be construed as, an admission of any liability or wrongdoing by Releasee.

clauses.heading: 4. Confidentiality of Settlement
clauses.body: The Parties agree to keep the existence, terms, and payment amount of this settlement strictly confidential, except as required for tax reporting or legal auditing purposes.

clauses.heading: 5. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Release shall be governed and construed according to the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I sue the releasee later if my injury worsens?
faq.answer: No. Once you sign a general release and receive the settlement consideration, you permanently waive all future claims related to that specific incident.

faq.question: What is 'consideration'?
faq.answer: Consideration is the value exchanged to make the release legally binding, such as a financial payout, return of properties, or mutual drop of lawsuits.
